title: Simple Arrows
description: This a simple mod that adds an alternative way to craft arrows. 1 cobblestone + 1 stick + 1 string
body:
This mod adds an alternate crafting recipe to more easily make arrows. Especially in the early game and without having to farm flint.

1 cobblestone + 1 stick + 1 string

I suggest getting a mod that adds flax or cotton so that you can grow crops to get string.
